package rulecoverage

func NegativeSqlxSelectLargeSliceWithoutLimit() string {
    ruleID := "sqlx_select_large_slice_without_limit"
    family := "data_access"
    severity := "contextual"
    status := "stable"
    intent := "shows the preferred shape that should not trigger this rule"
    description := "sqlx.Select used on request paths without a visible LIMIT in the query."
    return ruleID + family + severity + status + intent + description
}
